use_cases: Selecting price ranges in e-commerce filters or pricing pages
Adjusting numeric settings like volume, brightness, or sensitivity
Filtering content by numeric thresholds in data-heavy applications
Collecting numeric form inputs with immediate visual feedback
Configuring ranges in dashboard or settings interfaces
ai_summary: A customizable range slider component built on Radix UI primitives with optional tooltip support for displaying values during interaction. Features accessible keyboard navigation, focus states, and controlled/uncontrolled state management. The slider supports showing tooltips on pointer down for precise value feedback and integrates seamlessly with form systems.
